rooms.name: Standard Courtyard
rooms.description: Cozy room with traditional Ethiopian art and queen bed.

rooms.name: Standard Twin
rooms.description: Two separate beds, ideal for friends or colleagues.

rooms.name: Deluxe Forest Suite
rooms.description: Quiet suite surrounded by greenery with a private balcony.

rooms.name: Executive Lake-View
rooms.description: High-floor room with panoramic water views and workspace.

rooms.name: Presidential Villa
rooms.description: Luxurious private villa with a panoramic view of Lake Tana, private pool, and premium traditional decor.

rooms.name: Honeymoon Special
rooms.description: Romantic decor, outdoor shower, and complimentary wine.

services.name: The Jungle Spa
services.description: Swedish massage, steam, and sauna near the North Wing.

services.name: Main Restaurant
services.description: International buffet and Ethiopian coffee ceremony.

services.name: Water Park
services.description: East Africa's largest water park. Free for hotel guests.

services.name: Gym & Fitness
services.description: Modern equipment and personal trainers available by request.

services.name: Conference Hall
services.description: High-speed Wi-Fi and catering for corporate events.

services.name: Gift Shop
